_comment: FLAT baseline (no-kg). Upstream store_*_data tools -> local SQLite (server/revit-data.db), TS-only: does NOT touch the Revit C# socket (verified: store_*_data import only ../database/service.js; git diff 9b9f680..HEAD on the flat path is empty). Uses the FROZEN base build (poc-baseline @ 9b9f680) as the true 'base' reference; the flat code is byte-identical to current anyway. KG_BENCH_MODE=flat => kg_* NOT registered, sidecar never spawns. 'command' is the ABSOLUTE conda 'revitmcp' node.exe (plain 'node' not on PATH). Changing this needs a Claude Code restart + re-approval of THIS profile dir.
